message:
🎨 acmm: right-align 'Ask agent for help' in Feedback Loops expanded row (#8364)

Mirrors the Top Recommendations card where 'Ask agent for help' sits at
the right edge of each card. Same affordance, same visual position —
users find it where they expect it from the other card.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
